mapper.select: SELECT ag.auth_group_cd AS authGroupCd , ag.auth_group_nm AS authGroupNm , COALESCE(ag.is_active, true) AS isActive , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM om_user_m u WHERE COALESCE(u.is_deleted, false) = false AND COALESCE(u.user_info ->> 'auth_group', '') = ag.auth_group_cd ) AS userCount , ag.remark , to_char(ag.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt , ag.created_by AS createdBy , to_char(ag.updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt , ag.updated_by AS updatedBy FROM om_auth_group_m ag WHERE COALESCE(ag.is_deleted, false) = false ORDER BY ag.sort_seq ASC, ag.auth_group_cd ASC

SELECT ag.auth_group_cd AS authGroupCd , ag.auth_group_nm AS authGroupNm , COALESCE(ag.is_active, true) AS isActive , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM om_user_m u WHERE COALESCE(u.is_deleted, false) = false AND COALESCE(u.user_info ->> 'auth_group', '') = ag.auth_group_cd ) AS userCount , ag.remark , to_char(ag.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt , ag.created_by AS createdBy , to_char(ag.updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt , ag.updated_by AS updatedBy FROM om_auth_group_m ag WHERE ag.auth_group_cd = #{authGroupCd} AND COALESCE(ag.is_deleted, false) = false
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ag.sort_seq), 0) FROM om_auth_group_m ag WHERE COALESCE(ag.is_deleted, false) = false
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(ag.auth_group_cd FROM 6) AS INTEGER)), 0) FROM om_auth_group_m ag WHERE ag.auth_group_cd ~ '^AUTH-[0-9]{4}$'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_auth_group_m ( auth_group_cd, auth_group_nm, auth_group_info, is_active, sort_seq, remark, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{authGroupCd}, #{authGroupNm}, '{}'::jsonb, true, #{sortSeq}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId}, #{userId}, false )
